allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(time-entries\): Add inline table editing and settings page

Implement spreadsheet-style inline editing for time entries:
- Click row to enter edit mode with input fields
- Add/Save/Cancel/Delete buttons with HTMX
- Keyboard support \(Enter=save, Escape=cancel\)
- German error toasts for validation failures
- Empty table support for first entry

Add settings page for weekday defaults:
- Per-weekday work times \(start, end, break\)
- New rows auto-populate from user''s weekday defaults
- Settings link in navbar

New files:
- Row partials: _row_time_entry.html, _row_time_entry_edit.html
- Settings: settings.py routes, settings.html, _settings_weekday_defaults.html
- Tests: test_settings.py, test_template_filters.py, test_template_rendering.py

65 tests passing for time entries + settings modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
